name: platyplus-sensor-bridge
description: Local BLE sensor bridge: reads HR strap + smart trainer over the Mac's native Bluetooth and streams to the Platyplus ride player over a localhost WebSocket. Sidesteps macOS Chrome's Web Bluetooth limitation. Ships as a CLI and as a menubar app (#102).

extendInfo.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Connects to your heart-rate strap and smart trainer over Bluetooth so your ride shows live data.
